//: TS config (A61/A30). Base config: `tsc -p tsconfig.json` type-checks the pure-logic core (src/lib/**, native .ts, STRICT). The Svelte SPA (src/app/**: App.svelte + components + main.ts + lib/*.ts) is checked by svelte-check (tsconfig.svelte.json) instead, because plain tsc can't resolve .svelte imports (main.ts imports App.svelte). The marketing JS (src/site/**/*.js) stays untyped this pass (A69 converts it to Svelte). allowJs/checkJs are retained for the transition.
